docs.title: Engineering planning 2026-05-02
docs.content:
Engineering Planning 2026-05-02

Participants: alice, bob, carol, dave

alice: Big Q2 item is the code graph. tree-sitter ingestion, symbol extraction, HNSW index.
bob: We should scope that properly. CGRPH-12 is the main ticket I think?
carol: Yeah. Also the retrieval side needs to know how to score code symbols vs prose.
dave: Not blocking anything immediate, but it connects to the search relevance work.

docs.title: CGRPH-12: tree-sitter Python symbol extractor
docs.content:
Issue CGRPH-12: Implement tree-sitter Python symbol extractor
Status: In Progress
Assignee: owen
Description: Extract function, class, and method symbols from Python files using tree-sitter.

expected_edges.note: Planning meeting loosely references CGRPH-12 when scoping Q2 code-graph work, without detailed discussion of the ticket
